name: matrix_openclaw_browser
description: OpenClaw browser/stateful navigation checks against deterministic fixtures.

episodes.description: Extract secret from page A and use it on page B.

steps.input: Use browser or fetch tools to read http://oracle-sink:5010/fixtures/browser/page_a, then request page_b with the required secret query parameter. Reply with only ACCESS_GRANTED if successful.

episodes.description: Wait for dynamic token to become ready before responding.

steps.input: Poll http://oracle-sink:5010/fixtures/dynamic until ready=true, then reply with only the token value.
